titulo-home: Hello, I am Mateus Azevedo Araujo
assunto-home:
I am a Software Engineering student, interested in developing systems and web applications. This portfolio highlights some projects, skills, and experiences gained during my academic journey.

My goal is to apply knowledge in practice and continuously improve my skills in modern software development technologies.
assunto-sobremim:
I am a Software Engineering student at PUC Minas, with a focus on developing efficient and innovative technological solutions. Throughout my academic formation, I have been strengthening skills in programming, project documentation, databases, and web development, working with technologies such as Java, HTML, CSS, and others.

I have participated in several academic projects focused on building systems and applications, which allowed me to enhance analytical skills, problem-solving abilities, and attention to detail. I am constantly seeking to expand my knowledge in new tools and methodologies to contribute with structured and high-quality solutions in software development.
habilidade-descricao: List of technologies, tools, and competencies developed during academic training and completed projects.
projeto1-descricao: Application for managing expenses, allowing users to categorize budgets into pots such as college, transportation, food, and home, encouraging efficient and healthy financial control.
projeto2-descricao: VazTech is a commercial management application for Apple product stores, automating purchases, sales, inventory, services, clients, and finances. Developed with Angular (front-end) and Spring Boot (back-end), it uses JWT authentication and Azure SQL Server.
projeto3-descricao: Academic project developed for the Software Development Laboratory course, aiming to create a reusable web portfolio.
projeto4-nome: Understanding Code: The Influence of Documentation on Software Comprehension
projeto4-descricao: Academic study on the impact of software documentation on code comprehension. Real GitHub code was analyzed by students with and without access to documentation, demonstrating that lack of documentation increases errors and analysis time. Keywords: Documentation, Code Comprehension, Software Engineering.
descricao-experiencia1: Provided support for administrative and financial routines, assisting with document organization and payment monitoring. This experience helped develop skills such as organization, attention to detail, and information management.
descricao-experiencia2: Responsible for administrative and financial activities, including document organization, accounts payable control, and monitoring cash flow. The role contributed to strengthening skills in analysis, organization, and information management.
descricao-projeto: Brief project description highlighting objectives, technologies used, and results achieved. This project involved developing a web application using React and Node.js, focusing on performance and usability.
linguaem-projeto: Languages and Technologies: React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB
descricao-pdf: This document provides a comprehensive overview of my education, skills, and professional experiences, showcasing my qualifications and achievements in the field of software engineering.
